title: Planet Classes Mapped
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM Scan WHERE PlanetClass IS NOT NULL AND PlanetClass != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT PlanetClass AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Scan WHERE PlanetClass IS NOT NULL AND PlanetClass != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY PlanetClass ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} planetary bod(y/ies) scanned during the report period.
details.help: Filters Scan events to those with a PlanetClass to exclude star scans. Top 5 planet types shown in bar chart.

tagLines: Planetary survey data archived. The cartographic commission notes adequate classification diversity.
Rocky, icy, molten, or (occasionally) alive — the universe has a lot of real estate.
Each class is a different world. Each world, a different story waiting in the silence.
